sql.if: AND ( e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mp.dietary_restrictions LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mp.special_requirements LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mp.preference LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meal_plan mp LEFT JOIN elderly e ON mp.elderly_id = e.id

SELECT mp.id, mp.elderly_id AS elderlyId, e.name AS elderlyName, mp.dietary_restrictions AS dietaryRestrictions, mp.special_requirements AS specialRequirements, mp.preference, mp.create_time AS createTime, mp.update_time AS updateTime FROM meal_plan mp INNER JOIN ( SELECT mp2.id FROM meal_plan mp2 LEFT JOIN elderly e2 ON mp2.elderly_id = e2.id
AND ( e2.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mp2.dietary_restrictions LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mp2.special_requirements LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mp2.preference LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY mp2.elderly_id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize} ) page_ids ON mp.id = page_ids.id LEFT JOIN elderly e ON mp.elderly_id = e.id ORDER BY mp.elderly_id ASC

SELECT mp.id, mp.elderly_id AS elderlyId, e.name AS elderlyName, mp.dietary_restrictions AS dietaryRestrictions, mp.special_requirements AS specialRequirements, mp.preference, mp.create_time AS createTime, mp.update_time AS updateTime FROM meal_plan mp LEFT JOIN elderly e ON mp.elderly_id = e.id WHERE mp.elderly_id = #{elderlyId} LIMIT 1
